message:
fix: detect kubectl-claude from /docs/related-projects/kubectl-claude path (#708)

The version selector wasn't detecting kubectl-claude project because
the docs are at /docs/related-projects/kubectl-claude, not /docs/kubectl-claude.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
